metadata.publisher: Ghana Publishing Company Limited (Assembly Press), Accra
metadata.source_authority: Parliament of the Republic of Ghana
metadata.source_note: Appropriation Act, 2025 (Act 1126), hosted by the Ministry of Finance. The authorising provision (section 1) is the statutory higher authority for the administratively-parameterised transfer programmes (LEAP grants, school feeding, Free SHS): Parliament appropriates the programme allocations; the per-household and per-day amounts are set administratively and published by the responsible ministries (the upstream-source-check anchor for the rulespec-gh gh/policies modules).
metadata.title: Appropriation Act, 2025 (Act 1126) — authorising provisions
